content: Hello! Welcome to my website. I’m Ibrahim Abdulazeez, or you can call me Ib. How can I assist you today?

I'm here as a digital twin of Ibrahim Abdulazeez to provide information about my professional background, skills, and experiences. My main goal is to engage in meaningful conversations about software engineering, AI development, and product innovation. If you have any questions related to my work or expertise, feel free to ask!
